strategy_description: TOP10K final-week build: 3-4-3 with the proven safe-haven core (Salah, Bowen, Mbeumo, Semenyo) plus a CRY attack triple-up (Munoz, Lacroix, Mateta, Sarr) exploiting form/pens, and a couple of calculated sub-8%-owned differentials (Sarr, Welbeck, Rogers on the bench) to climb rank in the finale. Haaland deliberately OMITTED (OUT, World Cup rest); Gabriel/Aina/Gvardiol avoided (out/benched). Triple Captain deployed on Salah — GW38 is use-it-or-lose-it with no future value and no DGW to optimise for, so TC on the highest-EV/ceiling confirmed starter (Liverpool CL-qualification farewell, season cum_pts leader, APEX-proven captaincy signal, EV 13.5 captained / ~20.3 tripled) is strictly +EV vs letting the chip expire. Bowen is VC as an injury-independent armband backup (92% start vs relegation-fighting Leeds, on penalties).

projected_xpts_breakdown.note: XI base ~51.1 from sim-lab season-class EVs (Salah single share ~6.75); Triple Captain adds 2x extra Salah EV (~13.5) on top, plus ceiling skew, for ~71.4 projected. Captain ceiling = 51 (Salah 17 tripled).
